title: Liam Tindall
extract:
Liam Tindall (born 27 September 2001) is an English professional rugby league footballer who plays as a winger for the London Broncos in the RFL Championship. He has played for the England Knights at international level.
He has previously played for the Leeds Rhinos and Hull FC in the Super League. Tindall has spent time on loan from Leeds at Doncaster and the Bradford Bulls. He also spent time on loan at Bradford from Hull.
